titleStmt.title: SII 16.227: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 227. (A.R. No. 395 of 1920.) GUNTAKAL, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Kṛishṇasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1558 A.D., May 2.

It records a gift of the tyāgavartana given by the mahājanas of Guntakallu of Pōlēṭimāgāṇi in Jagatāpi-Gutti-sīma to the gods Bhōgēśvara, Kēśavaperumāḷ and Vīrēśvara of the same village by the Vipravinōdins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayu
kti saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 5 lu śrīmannmahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sa
dāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁ
du navaratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai kū¨rcuṁ
ḍi sāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu svā
mi sēvakulaina vipravinōdula kāśyapa
gōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśyākhādhyāyu
laina gōviṁdayya komāruḍu gōviṁdaya valabha
ya koḍuku valabhaya liṁgaya koḍuku pōlaya
jana muguruṁnu voppiyicina dha¨rmaśāsana kramame
ṭlaṁnanu jagatāpi guttisīma pōlēṭi māgāṇiki celle
guṁtakaṁṭigrāmamaṁdu sthānaṁbhōgēśvaruḍu kēśavaperu
māḷu vīrēśvaruḍu yī mūḍu dēvarlakuṁnu vaiśākha śu 5
puṇyakālamaṁdu guṁtakaṁṭi mahājanālu mā vipra
vinōdulakellānu yiccē tyāgava¨rtanalu yī mūḍu dēva
ḷakuṁnu vipravinōdula nānāgōtra nānāsūtra nānāśa
khādhyāyulaina vipravinōdulakelānu puṇyaṁgānu sa
hiraṁṇyōdakadānapū¨rvakaṁgānu trivācaka trikaraṇa
sudhigānu vipravinōdulakelānu puṇyaṁgānu
dēvaḷlaku dīpārādhanaku dhāravōsi Istimi I dha¨rma
śāsanānaku Ē vipravinōdi tapinānu vāraṇāsilō
nu gōbrāhmaṇala mātṛpitṛla vadhiṁcina dō
ṣāna bōyinavāru śunakamāṁsaṁ surāpānaṁ
sēviṁcinavāru tama mānābhimānaṁ bō
yilaku Icinavārulani Icina dha¨rmaśāsa
naṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
